branches.label: Bench focuses on record gaps
branches.prompt: Emphasize missing arrest, counsel, or family-intimation records and ask for record-producing directions.

branches.label: Opposite side relies on formal compliance
branches.prompt: Use contradictions and exact source anchors to separate formal assertions from documentary proof.

branches.label: Adverse authority is raised
branches.prompt: Distinguish on facts, stage, forum, or safeguards actually reflected in the record.
